# NVO987 Identity Infrastructure
# AI / LLM access policy

Identity: https://identity.nvo987.us
DID: did:web:identity.nvo987.us

# Domain network
Domains:
https://identity.nvo987.us
https://nvo987.us
https://nvo987.fr
https://knowledge.nvo987.us

# Public machine-readable endpoints
